creator: kevin@nyi.net
text:
When attempting to install from cd on a Dell 2950 with an LSI SAS controller, the box begins spamming the screen with errors from mfi fast enough that its difficult to read.  I was able to pick out "unexpected sense".  This is the second machine we've seen this on with the same hardware.  All of the hardware appears to be fine.

How-To-Repeat: Attempt to run the FreeBSD 7.0-RELEASE disc on a dell 2950 with an LSI Perc 5/i controller.
